content.en:
After Ye Tian came back, he began to cultivate again, but he also kept an eye on the situation in the universe.

As for the third and fourth deities, they don't help him much now, after all, the potential is too low, the upper limit is low, and there is no way to even cultivate the Xuanxuan Technique.

Of course, if Ye Tianzhen was willing to give up resources, he could also raise the third and fourth deities, but the price paid was too great and it was not cost-effective at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian let the third deity stay in the Wasteland, and regarded the Wasteland as the place of trial of the Heavenly Pavilion, and often let the members of the Heavenly Pavilion enter the Wasteland for training.

And the fourth deity infiltrated the Cangyu universe to investigate the situation.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

With the passage of time, the eternal universe is also filled with the rules of the Cangyu universe, and this new rule is of great benefit to the Earth Venerables, and they can comprehend the new rules when they have almost reached the limit on the Great Dao, which means that they can continue to progress.

The advent of the Dual Universe Era has made many cultivators progress rapidly, and some ancient cultivators have also broken the shackles and made rapid progress on the Great Dao.

And Ye Tian is not completely cultivating, he also often travels around the human race, copying and fusing a god-level talent, so that his origin talent can improve little by little, even if the progress is very slow and slow, but as long as he persists, one day, the origin talent will be completely transformed, and one super god-level talent will be born.

Another 10,000 years have passed!

The ten thousand races in the universe have changed a lot, even the ten thousand races are constantly fighting within themselves, and the other races outside the big race, even the higher races, do not have the slightest sense of security, and they don't know how much they have been destroyed.

The Terrans are also expanding, and the nearby higher races, middle races, and small races have been swallowed up by the Terrans, and even several cosmic races have become vassals of the Terrans.

The Terran is now too strong and too strong, the Earth Venerable is constantly born, and the luck is constantly soaring, and under the influence of the luck, there are many geniuses born in the Terran race, and even some mixed-level cultivation talents have been born.

The minimum achievement of a mixed-level cultivator talent in the future is to be an Earth Venerable, and the human race is now a powerful inheritance, and it is not difficult to become a six-star Earth Venerable.

The human race is strong, Ye Tian has gained a lot, he obviously feels that his cultivation speed has increased a lot, and even the speed of comprehending supernatural powers is also much faster, which is all the benefits brought by luck.

"The gain brought by luck is very good, except for some real geniuses who defy the sky, if other geniuses want to transcend, they really have to gather a large amount of qi luck, so that there is hope for transcendence!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition to the expansion of the human race, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other powerful Earth Lords had already taken action, and it was difficult for them to develop their races, so they followed the example of the Cangyu Universe Holy Lands and created one Holy Land after another.

It's just that their holy land is a little weak, except for the Yuangu Holy Land of the Lord of Yuangu, which is considered a real holy land, the other holy lands do not have god-level powerhouses in charge.

But even so, the other holy places at least had a ten-star Earth Venerable in charge, so they also attracted a large number of Earth Venerables.

There are a lot of Earth Venerables in the Universe through the ages, and many Scattered Earth Venerables now also know the matter of detachment, and they also know the importance of inheritance, if they don't find a backer, they will not be able to transcend in the future, and they can only die with the destruction of the universe.

As a result, these scattered cultivators joined one holy place after another.

But with the struggle with the Cangyu Universe and internal competition, there were only nine holy places where the Eternal Universe was finally born.

And most of the races in the universe perished, and only a few survived, among which the gods and demons actually united and gave birth to the gods and demons.

The Terran rules a huge area, which can be regarded as one side, and the other side is the Ten Thousand Races Alliance, which is an alliance of all races united by powerful races such as the Holy Light Clan, the Angel Clan, the Blood Clan, the Yaksha Clan, and the Demon Clan, plus a bunch of ordinary cosmic clans.

The reason why they unite is only to protect themselves, otherwise a single race will not survive at all, and sooner or later it will be wiped out.

"Three-legged!"

Ye Tian only smiled coldly at the current situation in the Eternal Universe.

There is no doubt that the human race is now the strongest race, if he makes a move, not to mention the alliance of all races and the gods and demons, even if he adds the nine holy places, they will all stop.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that the human race was still too few strong now, and the population could not occupy the entire universe, so there was no need to continue to occupy the territory.

The Nine Holy Lands, the Three Great Clans, and some small forces caught in the cracks, this is basically the current power situation of the Eternal Universe, but part of the power of the Cangyu Universe is also hidden in the Eternal Universe, as well as those who are reincarnated.

At the beginning, those reincarnated people may be weak, but they were all god-level powerhouses in the chaos before, and they were reincarnated in the universe, so naturally there is a way to return to the god-level again, even if they can't return to their peak, but they are not to be underestimated.

So, the reincarnated are also a powerful force!

In addition, the reincarnations of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe are all affiliated to the Tibetan God Organization, and once they have grown up completely, they are definitely the strongest forces in the two universes.

The Eternal Universe knew this, and the Cangyu Universe naturally knew it.

Therefore, the high-level leaders of the two universes are looking for reincarnateds, some people want to kill reincarnated people for opportunities, and some people will establish good relations with reincarnated people and secretly cooperate.

But those who are truly afraid of reincarnation, but not those who are afraid of the Hidden God Organization.

Even if he is the Lord of the Ancient Age, he is not afraid of the reincarnated, because he has also obtained some inheritance, if he really has a chance to transcend, then he can definitely become a disciple of some chaos powerhouses, and he still needs to be afraid of the Tibetan God Organization, maybe if he is separated from the universe, he will be picked up by his master, and he is not afraid of the Tibetan God Organization at all.

this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and smiled.

"The fourth deity has discovered a treasure of inheritance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the past 10,000 years, the fourth deity has been secretly investigating information in the Cangyu Universe, and is very cautious, after all, the ancient universe breath contaminated on his body is very serious, and he does not dare to appear near some powerful forces at all, until now that 10,000 years have passed, the ancient universe breath has almost disappeared, and the Cangyu universe breath has become much more, so he dares to explore at will.

And just now, he explored a cultivation treasure land, and it was also a cultivation treasure land jointly controlled by the high-level leaders of the Cangyu Universe.

The ordinary cultivation treasure land was useless to a god-level powerhouse like him, but according to his intelligence, this cultivation treasure land was not simple, and it even caused a number of god-level battles at the beginning, and one god-level general level also fell.

"Maybe I should go to the Cangyu Universe, otherwise cultivating in the Eternal Universe will be too slow to improve my strength!"

Ye Tian said lightly.
